news.t: Why Goldman Sachs is helping its clients launch ETFs
Hedge funds, family offices among those turning to Goldman Sachs ETF Accelerator

holdings.infoBox: BINV is an equity ETF with a total of 70 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sanofi stock at 3.07%, SAP SE at 2.53%, Alibaba Group Holding at 2.38%, Takeda Pharmaceutical Company at 2.25%, and Wal-Mart de México at 2.24%.

overview.description: The Brandes International ETF (BINV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in equity securities of companies who perform their business activities outside the US. The fund seeks securities that are perceived to be undervalued BINV was launched on Oct 3, 2023 and is issued by Brandes.

data.title: Why Goldman Sachs is helping its clients launch ETFs
data.text: Firms should offer ETF products because investor demand is not slowing down, according to one Goldman Sachs ETF expert.

data.title: Hedge funds, family offices among those turning to Goldman Sachs ETF Accelerator
data.text: Goldman Sachs Group's recently created business designed to help firms quickly launch exchange-traded funds has more than just traditional asset managers as clients.
